title: 'Abiyshay #0052
definition:
Abishai = "my father is Jesse" or "my father is a gift"

 1) grandson of Jesse, nephew of David via his sister Zeruiah,
    brother of Joab
nasbUsage:
Definition: Abishai = "my father is Jesse" or "my father is a gift"

 1) grandson of Jesse, nephew of David via his sister Zeruiah,
    brother of Joab

    NASB:  my father is Jesse, an Isr. name
